\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
# Split the data into the current period t and the lagged period t - 1
n_obs_mod3 <- nrow(USSteamCoEstim2)
current_period <- USSteamCoEstim2[-1, ]
lagged_period <- USSteamCoEstim2[-n_obs_mod3, ]

# Build the interaction terms before applying the AR(1) transformation
current_period$prod_summer <- current_period$production * current_period$summer
current_period$heat_summer <- current_period$heatDD * current_period$summer
current_period$cool_summer <- current_period$coolDD * current_period$summer

lagged_period$prod_summer <- lagged_period$production * lagged_period$summer
lagged_period$heat_summer <- lagged_period$heatDD * lagged_period$summer
lagged_period$cool_summer <- lagged_period$coolDD * lagged_period$summer

# Start from the current-period data and add the transformed variables
transformed_data <- current_period

# Quasi-difference the response
transformed_data$revenue_adj <- current_period$revenue - rho * lagged_period$revenue

# Quasi-difference the main effects
transformed_data$production_adj <- current_period$production - rho * lagged_period$production
transformed_data$heatDD_adj <- current_period$heatDD - rho * lagged_period$heatDD
transformed_data$coolDD_adj <- current_period$coolDD - rho * lagged_period$coolDD
transformed_data$summer_adj <- current_period$summer - rho * lagged_period$summer

# Quasi-difference the interaction terms
transformed_data$prod_summer_adj <- current_period$prod_summer - rho * lagged_period$prod_summer
transformed_data$heat_summer_adj <- current_period$heat_summer - rho * lagged_period$heat_summer
transformed_data$cool_summer_adj <- current_period$cool_summer - rho * lagged_period$cool_summer
\end{Verbatim}
\endgroup
\par\addvspace{\topsep}

\noindent We fit a new model using the transformed variables.
